title: 香草精华 Vanilla Essence
description: Faithful to the origional.    Better vanilla experience without any new blocks or mobs
body:
# **Stay Vanilla · Explore More · Run Faster**
![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.modrinth.com%2Fv2%2Fproject%2FHFQTHzke&label=Downloads&query=%24.downloads&logo=modrinth&color=00AF5C&labelColor=1A1A1A&style=flat-square)  
🏔️ **Stunning Terrain** - Terralith brings 100+ new biomes and landscapes  
🗺️ **Rich Structures** - Hundreds of new buildings from Repurposed Structures + Qraftyfied + Structory   
🎯 **Pure Vanilla** - No new blocks or mobs, authentic experience preserved  
⚡ **Extreme Optimization** - Over 10 handpicked optimization mods, dramatically boosting FPS!  
🎨 **Multiplayer Ready** - Works on Multiplayer or servers (no impact on gameplay)  
🛠️ **Polished Interface** - Smooth gui & Modern UI for vastly improved GUI  
🍃 **Maximum Compatibility** - Achieve the highest compatibility with the fewest mods, and can be installed elsewhere!  


### Ideal for:  
💫  Players who tried of overwhelming large modpacks  
💦  First-time modpack users  
🍀  Newcomers to Minecraft  





------

#  **忠于原版 · 全新探索 · 极致优化**

🏔️ **壮丽地形** - Terralith 带来 100+ 全新群系和地形变化  
🗺️ **丰富结构** - Repurposed Structures + Qraftyfied + Structory带来的数百种新建筑，比原版难度更低！  
🎯 **原汁原味** - 不添加新方块或生物，保持原版体验  
⚡ **极致优化** - 10+精选优化模组，大幅提升 FPS  
🎨 **适于联机** - 可加入多人游戏或者服务器（不影响游戏）  
🛠️ **美化界面** - Smooth gui 与 Modern UI对于界面的大幅改善  
🍃 **最大兼容** - 以尽可能少的模组实现最大的兼容性，也可以安装到其他地方！ 



### 适于：  
💫 厌于眼花缭乱的大型整合包  
💦 第一次玩整合包的人  
🍀 Minecraft新人  



![sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a670bce0d40ac87701c6b56867c8e7c033fdede3.png )
